subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Beloved Who hath from time immemorial been sanctified above the description of contingent beings and will evermore remain transcendently exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل مقدس از وصف ممکنات بوده و لایزال متعالی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
